Left Telencephalon.Shape: Large hemispheric structure with folded cortical and subcortical regions
Left Telencephalon.Location: Left cerebral hemisphere anterior and superior to diencephalon
Left Telencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Gray cortex darker than subcortical white matter on T1

Right Telencephalon.Shape: Large hemispheric structure with folded cortical and subcortical regions
Right Telencephalon.Location: Right cerebral hemisphere anterior and superior to diencephalon
Right Telencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Gray cortex darker than subcortical white matter on T1

Left Diencephalon.Shape: Central deep gray region with thalamus and hypothalamus
Left Diencephalon.Location: Left midline zone between telencephalon and mesencephalon
Left Diencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Deep gray intermediate intensity slightly darker than adjacent white matter

Right Diencephalon.Shape: Central deep gray region with thalamus and hypothalamus
Right Diencephalon.Location: Right midline zone between telencephalon and mesencephalon
Right Diencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Deep gray intermediate intensity slightly darker than adjacent white matter

Left Mesencephalon.Shape: Compact cylindrical midbrain segment with peduncles and tectum
Left Mesencephalon.Location: Left upper brainstem between diencephalon and pons
Left Mesencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Mixed T1 signal white tracts bright relative to gray nuclei

Right Mesencephalon.Shape: Compact cylindrical midbrain segment with peduncles and tectum
Right Mesencephalon.Location: Right upper brainstem between diencephalon and pons
Right Mesencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Mixed T1 signal white tracts bright relative to gray nuclei

Left Metencephalon.Shape: Rounded posterior fossa structure including cerebellum and pons
Left Metencephalon.Location: Left dorsal brainstem region posterior to mesencephalon
Left Metencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Cerebellar cortex hypointense to deep white matter on T1

Right Metencephalon.Shape: Rounded posterior fossa structure including cerebellum and pons
Right Metencephalon.Location: Right dorsal brainstem region posterior to mesencephalon
Right Metencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Cerebellar cortex hypointense to deep white matter on T1

Left Myelencephalon.Shape: Tapered caudal brainstem continuous with spinal cord
Left Myelencephalon.Location: Left medullary region inferior to pons
Left Myelencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal pyramids brighter than gray nuclei

Right Myelencephalon.Shape: Tapered caudal brainstem continuous with spinal cord
Right Myelencephalon.Location: Right medullary region inferior to pons
Right Myelencephalon.Intensity_Profile: Intermediate T1 signal pyramids brighter than gray nuclei

Cerebrospinal Fluid.Shape: Clear fluid filling ventricular and subarachnoid spaces
Cerebrospinal Fluid.Location: Surrounds brain and spinal cord within ventricles and cisterns
Cerebrospinal Fluid.Intensity_Profile: CSF hypointense on T1 hyperintense on T2 forming fluid boundaries
